hero.title: The Excellence of Handmade Dumplings
hero.subtitle: Lydmila Papyan's tradition meets Italian taste

about.title: The Story of Lydmila Papyan
about.content: Lydmila Papyan was born with a passion for cooking passed down through generations. Each of her dishes tells a story of tradition, care, and love for genuine ingredients. Her skilled hands bring to life pelmeni, khinkali, and vareniki that unite the authenticity of original recipes with the refinement of the Italian table. Only natural ingredients, carefully selected, for a culinary experience that warms the heart.

pelmeni.name: Classic Pelmeni
pelmeni.description: Little treasures of meat, wrapped in thin and delicate pasta

khinkali.name: Khinkali
khinkali.description: A bouquet of Caucasian flavors, rich and juicy

vareniki.name: Sweet Vareniki
vareniki.description: Sweetness and tradition in a soft embrace

steps.title: Home Delivery
steps.description: Receive your dumplings directly at your home, ready to enjoy.

items.name: Marco R.
items.text: Lydmila's pelmeni are incredible! You can feel all the love and care in the preparation. An authentic experience.

items.name: Sofia G.
items.text: Finally real khinkali in Italy! The broth inside is a real surprise. Highly recommended.

items.name: Alessandro M.
items.text: The sweet vareniki took me back to my childhood. A delightful discovery.

contact.title: Order Your Delights Now
